name: Łukasz Stanisław Pączek
title: Senior Test Automation Engineer
badge: test automation · API quality · banking & enterprise systems
tagline: Java / Spring / Playwright / Rest Assured / CI/CD
summary: Senior Test Automation Engineer and QA Lead with 10+ years of experience in banking, healthcare, e-commerce and enterprise systems. Builds and leads maintainable automation frameworks, API testing strategies, CI pipelines and quality metrics for complex delivery environments.
highlights: Senior QA Lead managing a team of 4 automation testers
Migration of Selenium-based framework to Playwright
Automation frameworks for banking and healthcare applications
API testing with Rest Assured, contract testing with Pact, service virtualization with WireMock
Quality metrics and monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana

metrics.label: years in QA and test automation

caseStudies.title: Selenium to Playwright framework migration
caseStudies.problem: A banking automation suite needed a more modern, reliable and maintainable browser automation stack.
caseStudies.role: Led and implemented migration work while coordinating automation testers and keeping delivery stable.
caseStudies.result: A Playwright-based direction with clearer modules, better maintainability and stronger confidence in critical web flows.

caseStudies.title: Backend API quality for regulated systems
caseStudies.problem: Fund management and healthcare systems required dependable API and integration validation beyond UI-only checks.
caseStudies.role: Built and maintained backend-focused tests, SQL checks and API validation layers integrated with delivery pipelines.
caseStudies.result: Faster feedback on service-level regressions and stronger coverage for business-critical flows.

caseStudies.title: Quality metrics and observability
caseStudies.problem: Teams needed better visibility into test status, system quality and automation outcomes.
caseStudies.role: Prepared reporting and monitoring signals for tests and system metrics.
caseStudies.result: Clearer quality dashboards and easier communication of risk, progress and system health.

recommendations.author: Filip Malmon
recommendations.quote: Łukasz demonstrated exceptional technical expertise and professionalism. His proactive approach to identifying potential issues early significantly improved overall code quality and reduced production risks.
recommendations.fullText: I worked closely with Łukasz during our collaboration on the Brown Brothers Harriman banking platform at SII. As the Senior Test Automation Engineer on our project, Łukasz demonstrated exceptional technical expertise and professionalism throughout our partnership. Łukasz consistently delivered comprehensive automated test suites that ensured the reliability and quality of our financial software solutions. His in-depth understanding of testing frameworks and banking domain requirements was evident in how thoroughly he approached complex testing scenarios. What impressed me most was his proactive approach to identifying potential issues early in the development cycle, which significantly improved our overall code quality and reduced production risks. Beyond his technical skills, Łukasz was an excellent collaborator who understood the importance of seamless integration between development and testing processes. His clear communication and systematic approach to problem-solving made our cross-functional work highly effective. He consistently provided valuable insights that helped shape our technical decisions and architectural choices. Łukasz brings both deep technical knowledge in test automation and strong collaborative skills to any project. His commitment to quality and attention to detail make him a valuable asset to any development team working on enterprise-scale applications. I highly recommend Łukasz and would welcome the opportunity to work with him again.

recommendations.author: Marcin Koźbiał
recommendations.quote: Znakomita wiedza techniczna oraz wyjątkowo rozwinięte umiejętności miękkie. Łukasz rozwinie każdy zespół i każdy projekt na poziom wykraczający ponad przeciętną.
recommendations.fullText: Jeżeli istnieje Tester i Leader idealny to Łukasz byłby wzorcem dla tego opisu. Łukasz nie tylko znakomicie rozumie swój zespół lecz również jest przykładem do naśladowania. Znakomita wiedza techniczna oraz wyjątkowo rozwinięte umiejętności miękkie. W świecie IT takich osób jak Łukasz jest bardzo mało. Przez ponad 10 lat pracy nie poznałem nikogo takiego jak Łukasz. Rozwinie każdy zespół i każdy projekt na poziom, który wykracza ponad przeciętną.

cooperation.headline: Available for test automation architecture, API quality consulting and framework migration.
cooperation.cta: Need a reliable automation framework or API test strategy? Let's talk.

services.title: Test Automation Architecture
services.description: Design and development of scalable automation frameworks using Java, Spring, Playwright, Selenium, TestNG, JUnit 5 and Cucumber.

services.title: Backend & API Quality
services.description: REST API validation, integration testing, contract testing, SQL checks and backend-focused test coverage with Rest Assured, Pact and WireMock.

services.title: CI/CD Quality Engineering
services.description: Automation integrated with Jenkins, GitLab and GitHub Actions, supported by Docker, TestContainers and maintainable pipelines.

services.title: QA Leadership
services.description: Planning, estimation, reporting, mentoring and coordination of automation work in Scrum, Kanban, SAFE and regulated banking environments.

services.title: Observability for Quality
services.description: Monitoring and reporting test and system metrics using Prometheus, Grafana, Elasticsearch and Kibana.

services.title: Web & Accessibility Testing
services.description: Manual and automated testing of web applications, mobile flows and WCAG-oriented accessibility validation.

approach.title: Frameworks that teams can maintain
approach.description: Automation is designed around clear structure, readable tests, reusable modules and documentation.

approach.title: Backend-first confidence
approach.description: API, integration and data validation are treated as core quality signals, not as an afterthought.

approach.title: Measured delivery
approach.description: Progress is visible through planning, estimates, metrics, dashboards and short feedback loops.

approach.title: Pragmatic leadership
approach.description: Hands-on engineering combined with mentoring, coordination and clear communication with delivery teams.
